changes.value:
File: model-embedding/src/batch.rs (0% coverage, 0/176 lines)

Entirely untested. Key functions:
- BatchStats::record_batch() and throughput methods (lines 80-130)
- BatchProcessor::new(), with_config(), set_progress_callback() (lines 192-217)
- process_batch() - core batch embedding with error recovery, memory monitoring, retry logic (lines 220-323)
- process_all() - splits input into batches and processes sequentially (lines 327-445)
- estimate_memory_usage() (lines 469-530)

This is critical infrastructure for bulk embedding. Tests can use a mock TextEmbedder that returns fixed vectors. Test error recovery, memory limit enforcement, and progress callbacks."
Test model-embedding BatchProcessor process_batch and process_all
